description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a combination of white and natural wood exterior finishes, set on a rectangular plot with a gently sloping driveway. The roof is predominantly gabled, with a main section and a smaller cross-gabled extension, both covered in a light gray material. Large windows line the front and side facades, providing ample natural light and a modern touch to the otherwise traditional form. The property is landscaped with several evenly spaced trees along the perimeter, enhancing its suburban character. A paved driveway leads to a covered carport or garage area, while the rear and side yards are open and accessible. The overall design blends modern and classic bungalow elements, making it suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gabled roof, white and wood exterior, large windows, and a paved driveway leading to a covered carport, surrounded by landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and the white and wood facade with trees lining the front.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and additional trees along the side of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage/carport area, back windows, and the open backyard space.
description_view_3: Back and side view showing a solid wall with minimal windows and trees along the rear property line.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
